narrative:
Crawford (precinct in Coshocton County) has 374 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
